Receive and reply to customer messages w: 通过Chatwoot 接收和回复客户消息
Your Chatwoot instance URL (e.g. https:/: 您的 Chatwoot 实例 URL (例如，https://app.chatwoot.com)
Your user API access token from Profile: 您的用户 API 访问令牌从配置文件设置
Your numeric account ID (visible in the: 您的数字帐户 ID (在仪表盘URL中可见)
\nTo connect your Chatwoot account:\n\n*:
To connect your Chatwoot account:

**Chatwoot URL:**
- For Chatwoot Cloud, use: `https://app.chatwoot.com`
- For self-hosted instances, use your server URL (e.g. `https://chatwoot.yourcompany.com`)

**API Access Token:**
1. Log in to your Chatwoot dashboard.
2. Click your avatar in the bottom-left corner and go to **Profile Settings**.
3. Scroll down to the **Access Token** section.
4. Copy your access token.

**Account ID:**
1. In your Chatwoot dashboard, the Account ID is visible in the URL: `/app/accounts/{ACCOUNT_ID}/...`
2. It is a numeric value (e.g. 1, 2, etc.)
Send a message reply to a Chatwoot conve: 发送消息回复到聊天室
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
The numeric conversation display ID. Ava: 数字对话显示ID。可从触发器输出获取。
If checked, sends as a private note visi: 如果选中此项，仅向代理人(而不是联系人)发送私人便笺。
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
HEAD: 黑色
Triggers when a contact sends a new mess: 触发联系人在聊天室对话中发送新消息
